and have 2-3 or more children. The native will be married between 19-21
years of age.lt will not be delayed beyond his 25th year. The native's (fmale)
partner will be the head of an institution and earn name and fame. The native
will suffer ill-health at the ages 32-33 and 36. The native will have favourable
times from 26th year onwards. His wife will have many acquaintan~
through her girl friends. She has to be careful at 23, 27 and 31. She will have
2 sons and 2 daughters and live upto a happy old age of70 years.
CHART 111
In this case Jupiter is in Pisces-his own house. Ketu is placed next to
him and there i~ no planet behind. Hence the native ~ill be the eldest child.
The Sun in Libra (debilitated) with Me':cury and Rahu indicates the father tra
ding in low type of articles, and the Moon's placement in Scorpio indicates
the articles to be drinks, wines etc. The father may deal in eatables. (Restau•
